name: Ugly Stik GX2 Spinning Rod
description: Durable fiberglass rod with graphite core — tough enough for pike and walleye.

name: Pflueger President Spinning Reel
description: Smooth 10-bearing reel with carbon drag. Excellent value for freshwater fishing.

name: Mepps Aglia Spinner (Size 3)
description: Classic French spinner. Deadly for brook trout, walleye, and pike.

name: Rapala Original Floating Minnow (F9)
description: Balsa wood minnow that swims with a lifelike wobble. Top choice for pike and bass.

name: Berkley PowerBait Garlic Scent Trout Dough
description: Synthetic dough bait that trout can't resist. Works stocked and wild trout.

name: Gamakatsu Octopus Circle Hooks (Size 4/0)
description: Strong, sharp circle hooks for live bait fishing — great for walleye and pike.

name: Suffix 832 Advanced Superline (30lb)
description: 8-strand braided line with zero stretch. Excellent sensitivity and casting distance.

name: Lindner Rig-N-Fry Jig Head (1/4 oz)
description: Pre-tied jig head with silicone body — deadly for walleye and perch.

name: Whopper Plopper Topwater Lure (Size 90)
description: Surface lure with a buzzing propeller that drives bass crazy in summer.

name: Smithwick Suspending Rattling Rogue
description: Suspending jerkbait with internal rattles. Excellent for suspended walleye and bass.

name: Musky Innovations Bull Dawg
description: Soft plastic jerkbait for musky fishing. Big, heavy, built for trophy fish.

name: St. Croix Mojo Musky Rod (8ft)
description: Heavy action rod built for throwing big musky baits and fighting large fish.

name: Okuma Cold Water SST Downrigger Rod
description: Deep trolling rod for lake trout and whitefish in Quebec's deep cold lakes.

name: Blue Fox Vibrax Spinner (Size 4)
description: Throbbing spinner with excellent flash. Catches everything from perch to pike.

name: Fishpond Nomad Boat Net
description: Rubber-mesh landing net that's easy on fish. Necessary for safely landing big trout and pike.
